activeFont.sourceFolder: D:/Content Daily AI News/Final Font/Young Typeface
activeFont.rule: Use this one font family only for Vietnamese Remotion clips unless the user explicitly changes it.

typographyNotes.headline: Use Bold Display, keep line-height at least 1.18 for Vietnamese diacritics.
typographyNotes.body: Use regular weight from the same family. Do not mix another font.
typographyNotes.avoid: Do not use Poppins, Plus Jakarta Sans, Manrope, Archivo, Newsreader, or Be Vietnam Pro in the same clip.
